title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Luffy, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is indeed a within a fixed range!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But can you keep that distance?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ahhhh that hurt! SHIT! Shurorora RORORO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: See, you'll suffocate if you get close!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Now, be cut by my flame!!

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
